notes: QuantConnect tactical relative-momentum rotation. EA runs one instance per host symbol; each reads the full universe's D1 bars to rank 50-day momentum and goes long the host only when it is the single strongest sleeve (100%-allocation rule). Foreign reads via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Card's defensive BND leg ported to XAUUSD.DWX gold proxy (no DWX bond CFD). SP500.DWX is a backtest-only read member. One position per magic.
